3270090.name: Forever Epic Story: A Journey of Life [Music EP]  *Leaving Steam Store
3270090.description:
What is Forever Epic Story?

Forever Epic Story is a Hip Hop/Pop group with a unique style and blend of melodic hooks, strong rap vocals and bass driven beats. Each song delivers a different story and tale to captivate and stimulate the imagination of the listener. Prepare to enter an epic journey into a world of creative sound and thought provoking lyrics. A never ending tale of inspiration, courage and fortitude, your Forever Epic Story now begins…

What is included with this application?

This application is an interactive music album including, exploration map, group bio, 4 videos with sing along lyrics and 4 audio MP3 singles from the group's album. Enter into a forever epic adventure and explore the map, music, music videos and more. *Get the complete interactive album to receive ALL videos and music.

What Music Tracks are Included for Download?

❌ 1. Open Up Your Eyes [Music Download, Video with Lyrics]

❌ 2. After All Said and Done [Music Download, Video with Lyrics]

❌ 3. Reality (Begin to Believe) [Music Download, Video with Lyrics]

✅ 4. Transcend Through Time [Music Download, Music Video with Lyrics]

✅ 5. Where People Know Me [Music Download, Music Video with Lyrics]

❌ 6. Blew Waters [Music Download, Music Video with Lyrics]

❌ 7. Angels Up Above (Eternity) [Music Download,  Video with Lyrics]

✅ 8. Far Above and Beyond [Music Download, Music Video with Lyrics]

❌ 9. This is My Prayer [Music Download, Music Video with Lyrics]

❌ 10. All Soldiers And Knights [Music Download, Video with Lyrics]

✅ *BONUS TRACK: Time to Be a Hero [Music Download, Music Video with Lyrics]

❌ *BONUS TRACK: Strider (No Hating on Me) [Music Download, Music Video with Lyrics]
